name: HAMMER TECHNOLOGY HOLDINGS CORP.
business: Hammer Technology Holdings Corp. provides digital stored value technology via its HammerPay mobile payments platform to enable digital commerce between consumers and branded merchants across the developing world.

exposures.sentence: Our financial technologies business is focused on providing digital stored value technology via our HammerPay mobile payments platform to enable digital commerce between consumers and branded merchants across the developing world, ensuring swift, safe and secure encrypted remittances and banking transactions.
